## Risk

Describe the risk and affected repositories or environments.

## Required Control

Describe the target control or policy.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Control is implemented or explicitly documented as accepted risk.
- [ ] Tests, scans, or evidence prove the control works.
- [ ] Documentation or runbooks are updated.
